schema.description: 已完赛比赛汇总：5 玩法 initial/last/result
schema.spf: 胜平负：{home, draw, away}, result in {home, draw, away}
schema.rqspf: 让球胜平负：{home, draw, away}, handicap 是让球数（主队让客队；-1 为主队让 1 球）
schema.bf: 比分：{score: "h:a", other: "胜其它"|"负其它"|"平其它"|null}；other 命中时即结算
schema.result: 完赛原始：{home, away, half, scorers_count, went_to_penalties, penalty_score}
